character.definition: (same as 妦) exquisite; fine; (said of a woman's figure) very full and voluptuous; buxom, used in girl's name
(said of a woman) with a charming sprightly carriage; slim; delicate and beautiful
(same as 焭 煢 惸) solitary; alone; single; brotherless; friendless; helpless, dice; a kind of gambling game played in ancient times
board to block the water current, to cross a river by a cross-beam
(same as 虈) angelica; the root of Dahurian angelica
a knot; a button, (dialect) to tie up; fastening; to wear; to slip on, to make a knot by a rope; a piece of string or a ribbon, (same as 繪) to draw (picture)

variants.raw_value: 并	並 併 幷
